covered_report_window: Wednesday, July 22, 2026 after U.S. market close plus Thursday, July 23, 2026 before U.S. market open.
market_context_summary: Nasdaq and growth sentiment were fragile ahead of Alphabet and Tesla; oil surged on Iran conflict risk, Treasury/inflation concerns persisted, and AI capex scrutiny remained central.
